“Tokens with Equity Do Not Work”
> “Nothing on a five-year time horizon is up. Most of the stuff is down 90, 95%. Even the best tokens that have an equity structure that have been around for a long time..They're flat..And the reason that they're flat is because there's this imbalance”
> “Everything about the token from the airdrop to what you need to do to incentivize distribution partners at cexes or custodians, it's all sell pressure. And if you don't have the buy pressure of investors buying the token to offset it, it doesn't work and it's down only.”

The World as Model - on sensing, representations, and the financialization of the physical world
Just as high-frequency trading firms won by building high-fidelity representations of market data, a new generation of companies is capturing physical infrastructure at its native resolution to create a digital representation layer
Mapping reality through physics-informed models instead of linguistic bottlenecks allows these platforms to accurately predict asset behavior and reshape how trillions of dollars in industrial assets are financed, insured, and traded
https://cruciblecapital.substack.com/p/the-world-as-model

Non-Sports Prediction Market Volume Hits $3.6B as Activity Surges on Kalshi and Polymarket
Up 18x Since July 2025
Source:
https://x.com/a16zcrypto/status/2070576245268688966

tweet.text:
The World Cup is attracting lots of interest and activity, and other areas are growing alongside. Non-sports volume — across categories like politics, economics, geopolitics, and current events — hit $3.6B last week on Kalshi and Polymarket combined. That’s larger than total prediction market volume (sports included) was just last year.

In July 2025, non-sports weekly volume was around $200M. It has grown roughly 18x since then, with the trajectory steepening sharply this month.

GPU compute lacks the forward curve and derivatives infrastructure that electricity developed over 30 years, forces expensive financing and creates barriers to entry via bespoke bilateral contracts
2025 US AI Action Plan signals federal intent to build standardized spot/forward markets modeled on electricity, with early infrastructure (Ornn Compute Exchange, Silicon Data) emerging and full derivatives likely within 3-5 years
(old post earlier this year)
https://davefriedman.substack.com/p/compute-is-the-commodity-no-one-knows

tweet.text:
Robots 🤖struggle at new long-horizon tasks. One trick to improve performance is using granular subtask labels ("grab the plate" instead of just "do the dishes").

Today we're releasing our first blog 📜: using VLMs to mine subtasks at scale (19x cheaper than human annotators!)

Collector Crypt's $62M revenue is the same money, going in circles
Collector Crypt’s reported $62M revenue was almost entirely ($58M) recycled external deposits looped through automated buyback bots, not organic demand - evidenced by 93% volume from top wallets and metronome-like bots making identical $250 buys 20 hours/day
The vault holds real graded cards worth $18.6M and recycling was disclosed, but revenue equals the float with near-zero net value creation
https://x.com/johna2an/status/2071106458695901425?s=20

Modern tech substitutes like streaming and AI chatbots have created a synthetic form of connection, accelerating a widespread public health crisis of loneliness
Overcoming this isolation requires people to embrace the vulnerability of real-world interactions and actively rebuild genuine communities through scheduled, in-person social groups
https://jords.life/p/counterfeit-congregation

tweet.text:
ZHIPU AI’S NEW MODEL REPORTEDLY MATCHES CLAUDE MYTHOS IN FINDING SECURITY VULNERABILITIES

A new AI model from Zhipu AI reportedly delivers security bug detection performance comparable to Anthropic’s Claude Mythos. The development underscores intensifying competition in advanced AI, particularly in cybersecurity and automated vulnerability research.

AI Chip Startup “Etched” Emerges from Stealth with $800M Raised and $1B in AI Chip Contracts
> Etched has emerged from stealth after raising $800M & securing over $1B in customer contracts, with its first AI inference racks set to ship this summer after successful early performance tests.
> The company also unveiled Low-Voltage Inference (LVI) and Cluster-Scale Memory (CSM), two chip architecture innovations designed to deliver state-of-the-art AI inference throughput, latency, and power efficiency for frontier AI models.
Source:
https://x.com/Etched/status/2071972062202343590?s=20

The AI Industry Is Losing
Massive trillion-dollar AI CAPEX boom represents a high-risk financial bubble that outpaces actual corporate cash flows and primarily serves to prop up deeply unprofitable model labs like OpenAI and Anthropic
If tech giants pull back on this aggressive data center and semiconductor spending due to disappointing returns, it could trigger a severe investment bust with catastrophic knock-on effects across heavily leveraged tech companies and financial creditors
https://www.wheresyoured.at/the-ai-industry-is-losing/

NVIDIA-BACKED TWELVE LABS RAISES $100M FROM AMAZON AND VC FUNDS
SOURCE

Most organizations remain in early adoption stages focused on chatbots for drafts and summaries
Only 2% of companies operate at advanced AI levels while 88% use it basically; a stark gap exists between leaders (39% of CEOs see advanced maturity) and workers (6% of individual contributors)
AI transformation is probably a slow "economic renovation" rather than rapid disruption
https://www.notion.com/resources/inside-the-ai-transformation

The next rally will be led by neocloud/compute stocks (not memory) given Anthropic’s 80% token margins and sustained AI infrastructure demand with longer-than-expected GPU lifecycles
https://degentradingdaily.substack.com/p/pre-market-thoughts-and-a-review

GPU compute lacks the forward curve and derivatives infrastructure that electricity developed over 30 years, forces expensive financing and creates barriers to entry via bespoke bilateral contracts
2025 US AI Action Plan signals federal intent to build standardized spot/forward markets modeled on electricity, with early infrastructure (Ornn Compute Exchange, Silicon Data) emerging and full derivatives likely within 3-5 years
(old post earlier this year)
https://davefriedman.substack.com/p/compute-is-the-commodity-no-one-knows

Etched raised $800m with AI inference racks, $1b+ in contracts, and breakthrough low-voltage + cluster-scale memory tech for frontier models
They are building complete AI inference clusters with custom chips that use low-voltage tech for higher performance and shared memory across the system, to ensure huge AI models faster and more efficiently
